file_name: Questionnaire - Barro Group - BQC Quarries and Burdekin Concrete.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any quarries or RMX plants you operate, the type of aggregate or concrete products you supply and/or purchase, and any commercial relationships you have with Barro, the BQC/Burdekin assets or the Sellers.

How closely do Barro and the BQC/Burdekin assets (together, the Parties) currently compete in the supply of Coarse Sand Products in the areas set out above? In your response: a. For each of the Parties’ quarry locations (Haughton River, Mount Kelly, and Ayr/Home Hill), describe the typical geographic distance (in kilometres or driving time) over which customers can efficiently source Coarse Sand Products. b. Describe how transport costs, or other factors (such as site access, or product type or quality), influence customer choice between the Parties as suppliers of Coarse Sand Products.
Identify and describe the main competitors to Barro and the BQC/Burdekin assets in the supply of Coarse Sand Products in the area surrounding the Parties’ respective quarries.

If you are a Coarse Sand Products customer of the Parties and were to stop sourcing from them, is it possible to switch your entire requirement to an alternative supplier? Please explain any costs (including transport costs), time delays, or technical barriers associated with making such a switch.

To what extent is sand containing clay a commercially viable substitute for sand which is naturally free of clay in RMX production? In your response, please describe: a. Any additional costs which would be incurred in order to process sand containing clay for RMX production. b. Any specific applications or projects where 'refined' clay-containing sand would not be an acceptable substitute for sand that is naturally free of clay.

How closely do the Parties compete in the supply of Hard Rock Products in the areas set out above? In your response: a. For each of the Parties’ quarry locations (Black River, Airville and West Euri, Bowen), describe the typical geographic distance (in kilometres or driving time) over which customers can efficiently source Hard Rock Products. b. Describe how transport costs, or other factors (such as site access or product quality), influence customer choice between suppliers of Hard Rock Products.
Identify and describe the main competitors to Barro and the BQC/Burdekin assets in the supply of Hard Rock Products in the areas surrounding the Parties’ respective quarries.

If you are a Hard Rock Products customer of the Parties and were to stop sourcing from them, is it possible to switch your entire requirement to an alternative supplier? Please consider any costs (including transport costs), time delays, or technical barriers associated with making such a switch.

How closely do the Parties currently compete in the supply of RMX in the areas set out above? In your response: a. For each of the Parties’ RMX locations (Bohle, northern Townsville, and Ayr), describe the typical geographic distance (in kilometres or driving time) over which customers can efficiently source RMX. b. Describe how transport costs, or other factors (such as site access or product quality), influence customer choice between the Parties as suppliers of RMX.
Identify and describe the main competitors to Barro and the BQC/Burdekin assets in the supply of RMX in the area surrounding the Parties’ respective RMX plants.

If you are a RMX customer of the Parties and were to stop sourcing from them, is it possible to switch your entire requirement to an alternative supplier? Please consider any costs (including transport costs), time delays, or technical barriers associated with making such a switch.

If you are a competing supplier of RMX, do you currently purchase Coarse Sand Products and/or Hard Rock Products from quarries operated by either of the Parties? If so, please identify the relevant quarry/s and product type/s.
Are there alternative quarries located close enough to your RMX plant/s to provide a competitive alternative to the Parties' products in terms of both volume and grade?
Outline any concerns you have regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
